mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_detection_response (detection_event_id, user_id, mine, responded_at) VALUES (#{detectionEventId}, #{userId}, #{mine}, #{respondedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM device_detection_response WHERE detection_event_id = #{eventId} AND mine = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM device_detection_response WHERE detection_event_id = #{eventId} AND mine = 0
